_comment: Example domain configuration for a clinical speech pathology project. Copy to .claude/team/domain-config.json and customize for your domain.
compliance: no cloud storage of patient data

terminology.phoneme mastery: consistently producing a sound correctly (score >= 4/5) across multiple attempts
terminology.elicitation: structured process of prompting a child to produce target words for assessment
terminology.calibration: initial phase where the system learns the subject's resting tongue position

validation_rules: Scores must not be visible to the subject during live assessment (avoid biasing)
All patient data stays on-premise (HIPAA requirement)
Assessment protocols follow published clinical standards
Manual SLP mode must capture only the child's speech, not the SLP's voice
Phoneme mastery thresholds: mastered >= 4.0 avg AND min >= 3, struggling < 3.0 avg OR any <= 1
